data.title: Veeva Systems to present at Raymond James 2025 TMT and Consumer Conference in NYC with CFO Brian Van Wagener and EVP Paul Shawah.
data.description: Pleasanton, California-based Veeva Systems disclosed on December 4, 2025 that they will be taking part in the Raymond James 2025 TMT and Consumer Conference in New York, NY. Brian Van Wagener, the Chief Financial Officer, and Paul Shawah, the Executive Vice President of Strategy, are set to present at the event on Monday. Veeva Systems is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol VEEV.

data.title: Docusign reports financial results for Q3 fiscal 2026 on October 31, 2025. Details available on investor.docusign.com.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 4, 2025, Docusign, Inc. (NASDAQ: DOCU) revealed its financial performance for the fiscal quarter ending October 31, 2025. Interested parties can find detailed remarks and financial outcomes on the company's website at investor.docusign.com before...

data.title: Gen Digital Inc. will present at Barclays Global Technology Conference on Dec. 4, 2025. CEO and CFO to participate.
data.description: In Mountain View, California on December 4, 2025, Gen Digital Inc. revealed that Vincent Pilette, the Chief Executive Officer, and Natalie Derse, the Chief Financial Officer, will be taking part in an event. Gen Digital Inc., listed on NASDAQ as GEN and known for promoting Digital Freedom, is a prominent global player in the industry.

data.title: HFS Research names Genpact as Horizon 3 Market Leader for supply chain services, highlighting AI innovation and financial impact. NY, Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: According to HFS Research, Genpact has been acknowledged for its AI-powered supply chain advancements, proven as-a-service operational approach, and tangible financial contributions. This recognition was shared in New York on December 4, 2025. Genpact, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol G, has been praised for its innovative technologies and impactful business model.

data.title: Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS) declares $0.59/share quarterly dividend, payable on January 30, 2026 to holders of record.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on December 4, 2025, Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.59 per share on its common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 15, 2026. The declared common dividend remains the same as the previous payment.

data.title: Tigerlily Foundation launches "Bliss Collective: Brunch & Sip" series to empower women nationwide. Focused on health equity and clinical trials.
data.description: In December 2025, the Tigerlily Foundation introduced the Bliss Collective: Brunch & Sip nationwide event series. This initiative aims to empower women and foster community while raising awareness about health equity and participation in clinical trials. The series will feature various events across the country, with a focus on promoting women's health and well-being.

data.title: ChargePoint reports exceeding revenue expectations in Q3 FY2026, marking a return to growth. CEO Rick Wilmer optimistic.
data.description: In Campbell, California, ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CHPT), a prominent provider of electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions, released their financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 ending on October 31, 2025. CEO Rick Wilmer expressed satisfaction with the results stating that the revenue surpassed predictions, signifying a resurgence in growth for the company. Additionally, in November, ChargePoint solidified its financial position by successfully completing a debt exchange.

data.title: Mytheresa and Hani's Bakery collaborate for a holiday gift shop in NYC, open Dec 4-14, 2025 at 764.
data.description: Luxury multi-brand digital platform Mytheresa and Manhattan's beloved Hani's bakery are joining forces to provide a one-of-a-kind holiday shopping experience. The collaborative pop-up shop will run from December 4 to 14, 2025, at 764 in New York City. This partnership aims to offer customers a unique selection of luxury goods and delectable baked treats, making it the go-to destination for holiday gifting.

data.title: RH will report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Dec 11, 2025. Numbers to be released after market close.
data.description: In Corte Madera, California, RH (NYSE: RH) disclosed its plans to unveil financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on November 1, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, December 11, 2025, after the market closes. The release will feature a shareholder letter from Chairman and CEO Gary Friedman, spotlighting the company's ongoing progress and recent achievements in fiscal 2025. This information, along with the financial results, will be available on the company's platform.

data.title: Ulta Beauty reveals Q3 fiscal 2025 results.
data.description: In recent news, record-breaking temperatures were reported globally last month, with an average increase of 2.4 degrees Fahrenheit (1.3 degrees Celsius) above pre-industrial levels. This marks the highest temperature anomaly for the month of July since record-keeping began. The extreme heatwave affected regions across the world, leading to devastating wildfires in various countries and unprecedented heat-related emergencies. Scientists warn that urgent action is needed to address the escalating impacts of climate change, as the window to prevent further catastrophic events is rapidly closing.

data.title: Ziegler secures $92,125,000 financing for United Methodist Retirement Homes in North Carolina.
data.description: Ziegler has recently completed the successful closure of The United Methodist Retirement Homes' Series 2025 Bonds, which totaled $92,125,000. The United Methodist Retirement Homes, based in North Carolina, is the entity associated with these bonds.

data.title: Darrin Jahnel appointed to Arrow Financial Corp. Board of Directors on Nov 25, 2025. CEO, entrepreneur, AI expert.
data.description: Recently, on November 25, 2025, Arrow Financial Corporation (NasdaqGS® - AROW) based in Glens Falls, N.Y., welcomed Darrin Jahnel to their Board of Directors. Jahnel, known for his expertise as a CEO, entrepreneur, and artificial intelligence specialist, brings a wealth of experience to the team. This appointment signifies a positive move for the company as they continue to strengthen their board with talented individuals.

data.title: Hillenbrand named to Newsweek's Most Responsible Companies 2026 list for its commitment to governance and sustainability.
data.description: For the second year in a row, Hillenbrand has been highlighted for its dedication to corporate responsibility through important governance and sustainability measures. The company, based in BATESVILLE, Ind., was acknowledged on Dec. 4, 2025. Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI), a key player in the global market, continues to show leadership in these areas.

data.title: Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) announces annual redemption of 281,167 units at $2.3119 per unit.
data.description: Toronto - On December 4, 2025, Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) revealed details about the annual redemption of 281,167 units of the Fund. Each unit will be redeemed at a price of $2.3119.

data.title: Citadel Income Fund (TSX: CTF.UN) announces annual redemption of 284,514 units at $3.8905 per unit on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on December 4, 2025, Citadel Income Fund (TSX – CTF.UN) shared news that they are pleased to disclose the specifics of the annual redemption of 284,514 units of the Fund. The redemption price per unit has been set at $3.8905.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp. to host X Spaces event on Dec 5th, 2025 discussing business recap & AMA. Nasdaq: DFDV, treasury accumulating & compounding SOL.
data.description: In Boca Raton, FL, on Dec 04, 2025, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV), known for their unique treasury strategy centered on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL), revealed plans for a live X Spaces event scheduled for December 5, 2025, at 1:00 PM ET. This event marks a significant step for DFDV as the first U.S. public company to adopt such a strategy in the market.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines had a successful meeting with the FDA for ulixacaltamide in essential tremor, set to submit NDA in early 2026.
data.description: Praxis has officially announced its intention to submit the New Drug Application (NDA) for ulixacaltamide, targeted at essential tremor treatment, in the first quarter of 2026. This move demonstrates the company's strategic timeline for seeking regulatory approval for the medication aimed at addressing this common neurological disorder.

data.title: Capricor Therapeutics plans public stock offering, granting underwriters option for additional 15% of shares.
data.description: Capricor Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CAPR) based in San Diego, has revealed plans for an underwritten public offering of shares of its common stock on December 4, 2025. The company will also offer underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 15% of the total shares sold during the offering. The completion of this proposed offering is dependent on market factors and other conditions, with uncertainties regarding the final size and terms of the offering.
PARAMOUNT’S LAW FIRM WARNS WARNER BROS DISCOVERY, RAISING “SERIOUS CONCERNS” ABOUT FAIRNESS AND ADEQUACY OF THE BIDDING PROCESS FOR A POTENTIAL DEAL WITH WBD

data.title: AUGA group signs Agreement to sell 100% shares of UAB “Baltic Champs” to Global Champs owned by Mhitarjans family.
data.description: A binding preliminary agreement was signed on December 4, 2025, by AUGA Group subsidiary RAB, legal entity code 126264360, with Latvian-capital company Global Champs, UAB, legal entity code 307494558, owned by the Mhitarjans family. This agreement entails the sale of 100% of the shares of UAB “Baltic Champs”, legal entity code 302942064, as part of one of the strategic actions outlined in AUGA Group's restructuring plan.
